description_long: This is a modern, semi-automatic rifle with a blue receiver and black polymer furniture, including a collapsible stock and pistol grip. The rifle features a long, ventilated handguard with multiple slots for accessory mounting, and a detachable box magazine inserted into the magwell. A compact optical scope is mounted on the top rail, providing enhanced aiming capability. The barrel is of standard length and ends with a simple, unadorned muzzle. The overall design is ergonomic and tactical, suitable for urban environments and rapid deployment. The combination of metal and polymer materials gives it a robust yet lightweight appearance.
description: A modern blue and black semi-automatic rifle with a collapsible stock, scope, and detachable magazine, featuring a ventilated handguard and ergonomic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile of the barrel, handguard, and muzzle, with the scope and stock aligned behind.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the blue receiver, black collapsible stock, pistol grip, scope, and detachable magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock, pistol grip, and the alignment of the handguard and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with the scope, magazine, and handguard clearly visible.
